# isproxy.org

> Free proxy intelligence lookup. Check whether an IPv4 address or hostname looks like Tor, an open proxy, a VPN/datacenter IP, hosting infrastructure, or a suspected residential proxy based on open data and honeypot signals.

## API
- Endpoint: https://api.isproxy.org/api/v1/host/{ip-or-domain}
- Method: GET
- Auth: none, free, no key required
- Response: JSON. Fields include `valid`, `type`, `geo`, `hostnames`, and a `privacy` object with detection category, confidence, reasons, evidence, and timing metadata.

## Examples
- https://api.isproxy.org/api/v1/host/1.1.1.1
- https://api.isproxy.org/api/v1/host/example.com

## Notes
Data is aggregated from free public proxy/privacy feeds plus local honeypot observations. Residential proxy detection is heuristic and should not be treated as certainty.
